description: The Socioboard instance (accessible at http://localhost) currently allows public user registration. Your task is to disable open registration to secure the instance for internal agency use only. Using the codebase at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/, remove the registration link from the login interface and add the text 'RESTRICTED SYSTEM: Authorized agency staff only.' to the login view. Disable the registration routes to prevent access to the registration page. Ensure all changes are active and the login page remains functional.

metadata.expected_banner: RESTRICTED SYSTEM: Authorized agency staff only.
